title: lysimachia angustiloba
intro: Lysimachia angustiloba, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to China, commonly used in traditional medicine. It has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lysimachia angustiloba include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Lysimachia angustiloba is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
